architecture_summary: Bind Personal Assistant approval decision evidence to the requested pre-decision approval queue state using a digest-only queue_precondition_ref while preserving the no-effect approval decision boundary.
data_model_changes: Add queue_precondition_ref to every approval decision evidence item.

Represent queue_precondition_ref as source projection, approval id, request id, plan id, requested queue state, request receipt id, review packet id, review packet digest, digest-only flag, precondition flag, no-effect flags, and queue_precondition_sha256.
Compute queue_precondition_sha256 from the queue precondition fields excluding the digest field itself.
Keep packet and receipt evidence unchanged so approval decisions continue to record operator evidence without executing proposed actions.
validator_changes: Runtime approval decision evidence captures the queue record before record_decision and emits a digest-only queue precondition ref.

Validator confirms queue_precondition_ref identity matches the decision item, source state is requested, source receipt is the request receipt, source review packet digest matches the checked-in approval review packet, no-effect flags remain false, and queue_precondition_sha256 is stable.
Focused tests assert runtime queue refs and reject queue precondition drift.
rollback_plan: Remove queue_precondition_ref from the approval decision schema, runtime builder, fixture, validator checks, tests, and SDLC artifacts; then rerun approval decision validation, focused approval queue tests, schema validation, SDLC validation, and diff checks.
migration_plan: No persisted migration is required. This changes a checked-in Foundation Mode evidence schema, deterministic fixture, validator, and tests only.
